attributes.name: AsMembershipListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to membership lifecycle events. Contract-critical events (MembershipChargedBack, MembershipRefunded) require explicit opt-in (they route on finance-critical queue and are financially load-bearing).

params.name: events
params.description: Empty = subscribe to every Academorix\Finance\Membership\Events\Membership* + Pass* event EXCEPT MembershipChargedBack + MembershipRefunded (explicit opt-in required).

attributes.name: AsPassConsumer
attributes.description: Marks a session/event/booking module as a Pass consumer. When a marked class is invoked with a pass id, PassObserver's consuming-branch performs the idempotent consumption + links consumed_by_session_id to the caller's session context.

params.name: consumer_kind
params.description: Enum: 'session' | 'event' | 'facility_booking'. Selects which polymorphic link to use.
